general.name: Nudge Ventura Upgrades
general.description: Configures Nudge for Monterey to Ventura
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>9ACBB8A0-3421-418A-8693-660F98A2EFB6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>9ACBB8A0-3421-418A-8693-660F98A2EFB6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Nudge Ventura Upgrades</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Configures Nudge for Monterey to Ventura</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>28990728-770B-4C8F-A4D1-E447E64F29FA</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>28990728-770B-4C8F-A4D1-E447E64F29FA</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.github.macadmins.Nudge</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>osVersionRequirements</key><array><dict><key>actionButtonPath</key><string>jamfselfservice://content?entity=policy&id=569&action=view&action=execute</string><key>requiredInstallationDate</key><string>2024-04-05T00:00:00Z</string><key>requiredMinimumOSVersion</key><string>13.0</string><key>targetedOSVersionsRule</key><string>13</string><key>targetedOSVersions</key><array/></dict></array><key>optionalFeatures</key><dict><key>aggressiveUserExperience</key><true/><key>aggressiveUserFullScreenExperience</key><false/><key>attemptToFetchMajorUpgrade</key><false/><key>enforceMinorUpdates</key><true/><key>acceptableApplicationBundleIDs</key><array><string>us.zoom.xos</string><string>com.jamfsoftware.selfservice.mac</string></array></dict><key>userExperience</key><dict><key>allowGracePeriods</key><true/><key>allowUserQuitDeferrals</key><false/><key>allowedDeferrals</key><integer>1000000</integer><key>allowedDeferralsUntilForcedSecondaryQuitButton</key><integer>14</integer><key>approachingRefreshCycle</key><integer>6000</integer><key>approachingWindowTime</key><integer>72</integer><key>elapsedRefreshCycle</key><integer>300</integer><key>gracePeriodInstallDelay</key><integer>24</integer><key>gracePeriodLaunchDelay</key><integer>48</integer><key>gracePeriodPath</key><string>/private/var/db/.AppleSetupDone</string><key>imminentRefreshCycle</key><integer>600</integer><key>imminentWindowTime</key><integer>24</integer><key>initialRefreshCycle</key><integer>18000</integer><key>maxRandomDelayInSeconds</key><integer>1200</integer><key>noTimers</key><false/><key>nudgeRefreshCycle</key><integer>60</integer><key>randomDelay</key><true/></dict><key>userInterface</key><dict><key>actionButtonPath</key><string>jamfselfservice://content?entity=policy&id=417&action=execute</string><key>fallbackLanguage</key><string>en</string><key>forceFallbackLanguage</key><true/><key>iconDarkPath</key><string>/Users/Shared/SCS_LOGO.jpg</string><key>iconLightPath</key><string>/Users/Shared/SCS_LOGO.jpg</string><key>showDeferralCount</key><true/><key>simpleMode</key><false/><key>singleQuitButton</key><true/><key>updateElements</key><array><dict><key>_language</key><string>en</string><key>mainContentSubHeader</key><string>Updates can take around 45 minutes to complete</string><key>subHeader</key><string>A friendly reminder from your SCS IT team</string></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
